## Frontend task

### Summary

Describe the Next.js component, page, or UI improvement.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] UI scaffolded in `apps/web`
- [ ] No business logic implemented in initial scaffold
- [ ] Keep the interface modular and contributor-friendly

### Notes

The frontend should connect to API endpoints once backend routes are defined in later issues.
